CustomField.formula:
IF( RecordType.Name == '2nd Tier Candidate' && !ISBLANK(IP_MC2Tier__c) ,IP_MC2Tier__c, IF( AND(IP_EarliestExpiringComplianceDate__c < Today(), NOT(BEGINS(IP_CitizenshipGroup__c,"Citizen of the")), NOT(ID_Time_Limited__c ="Indefinite") , IP_CountOfPORTWWithNoExpiry__c =0 ), "Expired Compliance","") & IF( AND(PORTW_Completed__c, ISBLANK(IP_PORTWStartDate__c),
NOT(BEGINS(IP_CitizenshipGroup__c,"Citizen of the")) ), "POTWStartDate","") & IF( AND(IP_EarliestExpiringComplianceDate__c >= Today(), IP_EarliestExpiringComplianceDate__c < Today()+30, NOT(BEGINS(IP_CitizenshipGroup__c,"Citizen of the")), IP_CountOfPORTWWithNoExpiry__c =0 ), "Expiring Compliance","")& IF( RecordType.Name != '2nd Tier Candidate' , IF( !ISBLANK(IP_MCPermWork__c)&&Perm_Work__c,"Missing for Perm: " +IP_MCPermWork__c ,"") & IF( !ISBLANK(IP_MCPAYE__c)&&IP_PAYECount__c>0,"Missing for Paye:" +IP_MCPAYE__c ,"") & IF( !ISBLANK(IP_MCLTD__c)&&IP_LTDCount__c>0,"Missing for LTD:" +IP_MCLTD__c ,"") & IF( !ISBLANK(IP_MCUmb__c)&&IP_UmbCount__c>0,"Missing for Umbrella:" +IP_MCUmb__c,""),"" ))
CustomField.label: Missing Compliance Details
